title: 3M Claw Plasterboard Picture Hanging Wall Hooks For Hanging Home Décor, 4 Hangers, Holds up to 7 kg - Ideal for Heavyweight Items

features: INCLUDES - 4 3M CLAW Plaster Board Picture Hanger, designed for heavyweight mirrors, frames, and home décor
HARDENED STEEL - Claws lock securely into plaster board
PROVEN HOLD - Trusted strength up to 7 kg
NO TOOLS - just push in with your thumbs
NO STUDS - Hang anywhere on plaster board
NO REGRETS - No big holes left in your walls
